flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clover Park Technical College fell 28% between 2013 and 2016 (63.2% → 45.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Clover Park Technical College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Clover Park Technical College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clover Park Technical College rose 123% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 2.6k).
